entities: Technical Trading Team; Edwin Carrion; Jason Rodriguez
reported_metric: CFTC complaint said the relevant period began in January 2020
market_health_signal: Pool-solicitation controls should have existed from inception

reported_metric: CFTC complaint said TTT was incorporated in Florida around April 2020
CFTC alleged more than 5 million USD was solicited from approximately 27 participants
market_health_signal: Pool size required registration and participant ledgers

reported_metric: CFTC alleged promissory notes promised 18 to 24 percent annual interest paid monthly
market_health_signal: Fixed payments needed stable P&L coverage

reported_metric: CFTC alleged defendants promised a reserve fund equal to participant contributions 1 percent trade risk and no overnight positions
market_health_signal: Risk and liquidity promises required broker-statement verification

reported_metric: CFTC alleged participants were told assets such as real estate and a trucking company supported the loans
market_health_signal: Collateral required title ownership and lien verification

reported_metric: CFTC alleged defendants lost more than 3.13 million USD trading leveraged retail forex
market_health_signal: Losses undermined fixed-return and principal repayment promises

reported_metric: CFTC alleged TTT notified some participants it had defaulted on loan principal and interest payments
market_health_signal: Default exposed mismatch between promised yield and realized losses

reported_metric: CFTC alleged defendants claimed they would create an AI-managed trading bot to recoup losses and repay loans
market_health_signal: Technology recovery claim needed live execution proof

reported_metric: CFTC filed complaint alleging retail forex pool fraud CPO fraud and registration failures
market_health_signal: Public enforcement challenged safety collateral and AI claims

reported_metric: CFTC announced charges involving a 5 million USD forex commodity pool scheme
market_health_signal: Public release summarized pool losses and requested remedies
